themes.title: Search Relevance Improvement
themes.description: Enhancing the relevance of search results to improve user satisfaction and engagement.

themes.title: Performance Optimization
themes.description: Improving the speed and efficiency of search queries, especially on mobile devices.

themes.title: User Experience Enhancement
themes.description: Gathering user feedback and improving the overall search experience through analytics and documentation.

milestones.name: MVP - Search Relevance Investigation
milestones.description: Investigate the drop in search relevance and fix autocomplete cache configuration.
milestones.success_criteria: Completion of investigation report and successful implementation of cache configuration.

milestones.name: V1 - Optimize Mobile Search
milestones.description: Optimize mobile search latency and monitor search relevance metrics.
milestones.success_criteria: Reduction in mobile search latency by 30% and establishment of monitoring metrics.

milestones.name: V2 - User Feedback and Analytics
milestones.description: Collect user feedback, enhance analytics dashboard, and implement error handling.
milestones.success_criteria: Collection of user feedback and successful implementation of analytics enhancements.

sequencing.reason: The findings from the MVP phase are critical for optimizing mobile search in V1.
Improvements in mobile search performance must be established before gathering user feedback and enhancing analytics.

mvp.goal: Investigate and resolve critical issues affecting search relevance.

v1.goal: Optimize search performance and establish monitoring for relevance.

v2.goal: Enhance user experience through feedback and improved analytics.
